name: suiviProjets
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y rustup libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libssl-dev pkg-config file build-essential && rustup default stable && mkdir -p ~/.claude/projects/-workspaces-suiviProjets && rm -rf ~/.claude/projects/-workspaces-suiviProjets/memory && ln -s ./.claude/memory ~/.claude/projects/-workspaces-suiviProjets/memory
